HGSS.140.0000:
This is the “Potential” room.
It is to show the infinite potential\r
of both Pokémon and people.
HGSS.140.0001:
Only the Pokéathletes who have held
the best record in every event\r
are allowed here.\f
Continue your hard work toward
breaking every record there is.
HGSS.140.0002:
This is the “Friendship” room.
Please go ahead.
HGSS.140.0003:
You are quite a Pokéathlete to
come here!\f
But you still have a long way
to become the Top Pokéathlete.\f
Shall I show you some special
techniques? [0200,0000]
HGSS.140.0004:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Do you have anything else\r
you want to know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.140.0005:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Do you have anything else\r
you want to know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.140.0007:
Which event would you
like to know about? [0200,0000]
HGSS.140.0008:
In Hurdle Dash, timing is everything.\f
Your Pokémon will pick up speed
if you let them wait until the last\r
moment before they jump the Hurdles.\f
HGSS.140.0009:
Pennant Capture...\f
This event is not only about the
Pennants on the beach, but also\r
the ones other Pokémon have collected.\f
If you bump into them from behind,
they will be knocked down and your\r
Pokémon will grab their Pennants.\f
That’s the way experts fight.\f
HGSS.140.0010:
The key is to push other Pokémon out
of the Circles...which may be obvious.\f
Actually, your Pokémon can push harder
if you pick the right moment to tell\r
them to push.\f
So you might be able to push back
powerful Pokémon if you give frequent\r
instructions to push.\f
HGSS.140.0011:
Block Smash is not just about smashing.\f
Did you ever notice that sometimes
there are small cracks in the Blocks?\f
Well, if you can hit those cracks,
they break real fast!\f
If you can aim at cracks in a row,
your Pokémon will feel great and\r
they’ll show great potential.\f
One more thing...\f
When you make them switch,
flick your Pokémon upwards\r
for a quicker switch.\f
HGSS.140.0012:
Disc Catch is about how long you can
wait until you catch the Discs.\f
Bird Pokémon can move around in the
air, so it’ll be easier to catch Discs\r
if you form a team of bird Pokémon.\f
HGSS.140.0013:
Lamp Jump is not only about jumping.\f
There are three Pokémon bouncing
together, so one Pokémon can’t jump\r
well if another comes down right when\r
the other wants to go up in the air.\f
Letting them jump at the right time
is the key.\f
HGSS.140.0014:
Relay Run requires well-timed switching.\f
Did you notice that Pokémon start to
sweat a little when they become tired?\f
It also indicates they have slowed down
a lot.\f
You shouldn’t allow them to sweat.\f
Switching before they start to sweat,
that is the key.\f
HGSS.140.0015:
It’s not easy to aim for the top
by just tackling a lot in Ring Drop.\r
Do you know what a “Body Attack” is?\f
I call it a Body Attack, anyway...\f
Your Pokémon can actually jump
as it moves forward.\f
If you can let your Pokémon
Body Attack others, you can drop\r
them off the Ring altogether!\f
HGSS.140.0016:
Snow Throw is not just about smashing.\f
Are you making sure the Snowballs
are big?\f
Bigger Snowballs have a better
chance of making other Pokémon\r
fall down.\f
You can also block other Snowballs
from hitting your Pokémon by having\r
your Pokémon hold on to\r
some Snowballs.\f
HGSS.140.0017:
Goal Roll requires the skills of
a Pokéathlete.\f
The situation changes every second,
but stay calm as you instruct\r
your Pokémon.\f
Positioning is key.\f
I recommend keeping one at your own
Goal to protect it--one in the middle of\r
the field for flexibility and one in\r
front of the Goal you want to\r
roll the ball into.\f
HGSS.140.0018:
I hope you’ll become a Top Pokéathlete.
Good luck!
HGSS.140.0019:
Those who have won at the Pokéathlon
100 times are commemorated here for\r
their achievement of creating the new,\r
legendary record.
HGSS.140.0020:
It is a cool Pokégear to commemorate
your 100th victory in the Pokéathlon.\f
That is your model!
It is a special Pokégear with\r
the Pokéathlon logo in the back.
HGSS.140.0021:
Those Pokéathletes who have come in
first in every event at the Pokéathlon\r
50 times are commemorated here for\r
their overwhelming might and the\r
arrival of a new legend.
HGSS.140.0022:
It’s an awesome Poké Ball to
commemorate your 50th victory\r
in every Pokéathlon event.\f
It’s your model Poké Ball!
The engraving reads, “Stay on Top.”
